code:
import io
import string

value ParseResult
  value: Int
  next: Int
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut j = start
  mut done = false
  while j < n and not done
    let c = byte_or_zero(s, j)
    if is_ws(c)
      j = j + 1
    else
      done = true
    end
  end
  j
end

fn parse_one(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> ParseResult
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = skip_ws(s, start)
  mut sign = 1
  let first = byte_or_zero(s, i)
  if first == 45
    sign = -1
    i = i + 1
  else if first == 43
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut val = 0
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    let c = byte_or_zero(s, i)
    if c >= 48 and c <= 57
      val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
      i = i + 1
    else
      done = true
    end
  end
  ParseResult(value: val * sign, next: i)
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let r1 = parse_one(input, 0)
let r2 = parse_one(input, r1.next)
let r3 = parse_one(input, r2.next)
let a = r1.value
let b = r2.value
let s = r3.value

mut out = ""
mut cur = a
mut first = true
while cur < b
  if first
    out = "#{cur}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur}"
  end
  cur = cur + s
end
println(out)
